promotions.title: 0 Handling Fee for the First Remittance to Chinese Mainland
promotions.highlight: 💸 First remittance to Chinese Mainland with 0 handling fee
promotions.description: First-time remittance to Chinese Mainland via 'Remit to Chinese Mainland·WeRemit' service with zero handling fees. Recipients can receive funds as soon as 1 hour after transfer. One-time offer per customer.
promotions.quota: Limited quota, first come, first served. One-time offer per customer.
promotions.cost: Any remittance amount to Chinese Mainland

promotions.title: Activate Money Safe, Get a Pacific Coffee Voucher
promotions.highlight: ☕ Free HKD30 Pacific Coffee e-Cash Voucher when activating Money Safe
promotions.description: Deposit any amount into a 'Money Safe' account and receive a HKD30 Pacific Coffee e-Cash Voucher. Money Safe is an anti-fraud feature introduced by HKMA that offers the same interest rates as regular savings/time deposit while providing enhanced protection.
promotions.quota: Limited quota, first come, first served
promotions.cost: Any deposit amount into Money Safe account

promotions.title: Travel With Visa Flight Booking Cash Rebate
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Up to HKD800 cash rebate on flight bookings
promotions.description: Visa cardholders can receive up to HKD800 cash rebate when booking air tickets with select airlines (Air New Zealand, ANA, Ethiopian Airlines, EVA AIR or Singapore Airlines) via their official Hong Kong or Macau websites.
promotions.cost: Minimum HKD4,000 spend for HKD240 rebate, HKD8,000+ for HKD800 rebate

promotions.title: Bank Securities Transfer 24/7 Service
promotions.highlight: 🏦 24/7 instant bank securities transfers in multiple currencies
promotions.description: Transfer securities between bank accounts instantly with 24/7 service. Supports multiple currencies including HKD, USD, and CNY with instant arrival of funds.

promotions.title: Lifetime $0 Commissions on HK Stocks
promotions.highlight: 📈 Trade stocks with low fees and fractional shares option
promotions.description: Trade Hong Kong and US stocks instantly with low fees. Service includes fractional share trading and global market access for investors of all levels.

promotions.title: Money Safe Protection with Interest
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Enhanced anti-fraud protection while earning regular interest
promotions.description: Money Safe feature provides enhanced protection against fraud losses while still earning regular Savings or Time Deposit interest rates. Funds can only be unlocked with an in-person appointment for additional security.

promotions.title: Mobile Account Opening in 5 Minutes
promotions.highlight: 📱 Open an account via mobile as fast as 5 minutes
promotions.description: Quick and convenient account opening process that can be completed in as little as 5 minutes via mobile phone. Available for both Hong Kong residents and visitors physically present in Hong Kong.

promotions.title: No Account Fees or Minimum Balance
promotions.highlight: 💰 Zero account management fees and no minimum balance
promotions.description: Enjoy banking services without any account management fees. No minimum deposit balance requirement for maintaining the account.

promotions.title: Personal Loan with Personalized Stellar APR
promotions.highlight: 💳 Personal loans with APR from 7.43% to 35.05%
promotions.description: Personalized loan service with APR ranging from 7.43% to 35.05%. Total loan amount up to 12 times monthly salary or HKD1,000,000 (whichever is lower). Fast approval with loan disbursement in as little as 5 minutes.
promotions.cost: Interest charges based on personalized APR

promotions.title: Multi-Currency Savings Account
promotions.highlight: 🌐 Savings accounts with no minimum balance in multiple currencies
promotions.description: Savings accounts available in multiple currencies with no minimum balance requirement. Offers flexibility for customers to manage funds in different currencies.

promotions.title: Flexible Time Deposit Placement
promotions.highlight: 🕰️ 24/7 time deposit placement with flexible tenors
promotions.description: Airstar Bank offers time deposit services with flexible tenor options and the convenience of 24/7 placement. This allows customers to start earning higher interest rates at any time that suits them.

promotions.title: Multi-Currency Instant Transfers
promotions.highlight: ⚡ 24/7 instant transfers in multiple currencies including HKD and CNY via FPS
promotions.description: Airstar Bank supports transfers in multiple currencies (HKD, USD, CNY, etc.) with 24/7 instant transfer capabilities for HKD and CNY via FPS. Transfers can be made using mobile numbers, email addresses, or account numbers.

promotions.title: Trade Hong Kong & US Stocks Instantly
promotions.highlight: 🔢 Invest in stocks with fractional shares from 1 share or US$5
promotions.description: Start investing with just 1 share for HK stocks or as little as US$5 for US stocks through fractional share investing. Makes diversification accessible for investors with smaller amounts of capital.
promotions.cost: Minimum 1 share (HK stocks) or US$5 (US stocks)

promotions.title: Personal Loan with Fast Approval
promotions.highlight: 💵 Personal loans up to 12x monthly salary with 5-minute disbursement
promotions.description: Airstar Bank offers personal loans with personalized APR ranging from 7.43% to 35.05%. Total loan amounts can reach up to 12 times of monthly salary or HKD1,000,000 (whichever is lower), with the entire process from application to disbursement potentially taking as little as 5 minutes.
promotions.cost: Interest rates vary based on credit assessment

promotions.title: 24/7 Online Banking Services
promotions.highlight: 🕒 Round-the-clock digital banking access with 24-hour customer support
promotions.description: Airstar Bank provides 24/7 online banking services with a 24-hour customer hotline for support at any time. This allows customers to manage their banking needs at their convenience regardless of time.

promotions.title: 24/7 Forex Trading
promotions.highlight: 💱 Real-time FX trading available 24/7 in 11 currencies
promotions.description: 24/7 foreign exchange service with real-time quotes and instant trading. Supports 11 currencies including HKD, USD, CNY, and more with immediate transfers after conversion.

promotions.title: Fractional Shares Investing
promotions.highlight: 📊 Start investing with just 1 share or US$5
promotions.description: Customers can invest in HK stocks with just 1 share or as little as US$5 for US stocks through fractional share investing. This makes investing more accessible with a lower entry barrier.
promotions.cost: As little as 1 share for HK stocks or US$5 for US stocks

promotions.title: Pay Shield Real-Time Fraud Protection
promotions.highlight: 🛡️ 24/7 real-time fraud protection for payments
promotions.description: Airstar Bank Visa Platinum Card offers Pay Shield, a 24/7 real-time fraud protection system. This feature provides an additional layer of security for all payment transactions.

promotions.title: No Minimum Balance Requirement
promotions.highlight: 💳 No account management fees and no minimum deposit
promotions.description: Airstar Bank offers savings accounts with no minimum balance requirement. Multi-currency savings options are available with no account management fees.

promotions.title: Pay Shield Real-Time Fraud Protection
promotions.highlight: 🛡️ 24/7 real-time fraud protection for payment transactions
promotions.description: Airstar Bank Visa Platinum Card offers Pay Shield, a 24/7 real-time fraud protection system. This security feature continuously monitors transactions to detect and prevent fraudulent activities, providing cardholders with enhanced payment protection.

promotions.title: eM+ High Yield Account (Libra Savings) Up to 2.0% p.a. Interest Rate
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn up to 2% p.a. interest on HKD deposits
promotions.description: Customers who successfully upgrade to eM+ High Yield Account (Libra Savings) through the AlipayHK App can enjoy tiered interest rates with up to 2.0% p.a. on deposits between HKD 200,000-800,000. First HKD 200,000 earns 0.5% p.a., while amounts above HKD 800,000 earn standard savings rate of 0.001% p.a.
promotions.cost: Minimum HKD 200,000 to earn higher rate

promotions.title: SME Loan Cash Rebate Promotion
promotions.highlight: 💵 Up to HKD 100,000 cash rebate on first SME loan withdrawal
promotions.description: Limited-time promotion for SME loan customers offering up to HKD 100,000 cash rebate on first withdrawal. Terms and conditions apply.

promotions.title: Multi-Currency Savings Account Upgrade
promotions.highlight: 🌐 Support for HKD, RMB and USD currencies
promotions.description: Savings account upgraded to support multiple currencies including Hong Kong Dollar, Renminbi and US Dollar. New functionality allows direct transfers from Libra Savings to third-party accounts with increased daily transfer limit of up to HKD 1 million.

promotions.title: Securities Trading Platform with Low/Zero Commission
promotions.highlight: 🏆 Moving towards zero brokerage fee trading
promotions.description: Securities trading service with movement towards zero brokerage fees. Terms and conditions apply, please refer to relevant documents and the bank's financial services charge guide.

promotions.title: Fixed Deposit Early Withdrawal with Zero Penalty Interest
promotions.highlight: 🔓 Withdraw fixed deposits early with no penalty interest
promotions.description: Customers can withdraw their entire fixed deposit before maturity without paying any penalty interest. This feature provides flexibility for accessing funds when needed while still enjoying the benefits of fixed deposit interest rates.
promotions.quota: Available to all fixed deposit customers
promotions.cost: Free (early withdrawal only available for the entire deposit amount, not partial withdrawals)

promotions.title: One-Stop Hong Kong and US Stock Trading Platform
promotions.highlight: 🌐 Trade Hong Kong and US stocks through a single platform
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers a one-stop trading platform connecting Hong Kong and US stock markets, providing global investment opportunities. The platform offers Hong Kong stocks, US stocks, ETFs and other global investment options all in one place.
promotions.quota: Available to Hong Kong residents only (not applicable to mainland and overseas users without Hong Kong resident identity)

promotions.title: Low Minimum Fund Investment Threshold
promotions.highlight: 💼 Invest in funds with as little as HKD $1
promotions.description: Ant Bank's fund investment platform allows customers to invest in funds with a minimum amount as low as HKD $1. This low entry threshold makes fund investments accessible to a wider range of customers.

promotions.title: One-Minute Investment Account Opening
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open investment account in as fast as 1 minute
promotions.description: Simplified investment account opening process that takes as little as 1 minute to complete. No income proof required, making it quick and convenient for customers to start investing immediately.
promotions.quota: Must be at least 18 years old, not a US or Canadian resident/citizen, and physically in Hong Kong during account opening

promotions.title: Zero Fund Subscription and Redemption Fee Offer
promotions.highlight: 🏦 $0 cost for fund subscription and redemption
promotions.description: Limited-time offer with zero fees for both fund subscription and redemption on the new Ant Bank investment fund platform. Truly $0 cost investment opportunity.
promotions.cost: Free, minimum investment amount of HKD $1

promotions.title: Insurance Premium 100% Rebate
promotions.highlight: 💯 Get 100% of your insurance premium rebated
promotions.description: Customers can enjoy a 100% rebate on their insurance premium when purchasing eligible insurance products through Ant Bank. The bank acts as an agent for YF Life Insurance International Ltd. and offers this premium rebate as part of their insurance promotion.

promotions.title: Insurance Products with up to 3.6% Annualized Rate
promotions.highlight: 📈 Up to 3.6% annualized rate on insurance products
promotions.description: Insurance products offering up to 3.6% annualized rate. Ant Bank (Hong Kong) Limited is registered as an agent for YF Life Insurance International Limited for distribution of life and general insurance products in Hong Kong SAR.

promotions.title: HKD $1 Minimum Fixed Deposit
promotions.highlight: 💵 Start a fixed deposit with just HKD $1
promotions.description: Customers can open a fixed deposit account with Ant Bank with a minimum deposit of just HKD $1. This low entry barrier makes fixed deposits accessible to everyone and allows customers to customize their deposit term limits.

promotions.title: Secured Savings Deposit Protection Service
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Multiple protection layers for your bank deposits
promotions.description: Ant Bank (Hong Kong) has launched the Secure Deposit Service, an anti-fraud measure introduced by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority to provide multiple layers of protection for bank deposits. The service covers Libra Savings and current savings accounts, allowing users to lock spare deposits which cannot be transferred out through any channels or methods.

promotions.title: 3-Minute Securities Account Opening
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open a securities account in as fast as 3 minutes
promotions.description: Customers can open a securities trading account with Ant Bank in as little as 3 minutes. This quick account opening service allows customers to start trading Hong Kong and US stocks quickly, with all services managed through a single app.
promotions.quota: Available to Hong Kong residents only

promotions.title: Ant Bank Global Stock Trading Platform
promotions.highlight: 🌎 One-stop platform for trading Hong Kong and US stocks
promotions.description: Integrated trading platform connecting Hong Kong and US stock markets to capture global investment opportunities. Provides access to Hong Kong stocks, US stocks, ETFs and other global investment options.
promotions.quota: Hong Kong residents only (not applicable to mainland and overseas users without Hong Kong resident status)

promotions.title: Insurance Products with Annual Rate up to 3.6%
promotions.highlight: 📈 Up to 3.6% annual rate on insurance products
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers insurance products with annual rates of up to 3.6%. These insurance plans are products of YF Life Insurance International Ltd. and not Ant Bank, intended for sale in Hong Kong SAR through Ant Bank.

promotions.title: New Ant Bank Investment Fund Platform
promotions.highlight: 🔄 $0 subscription and redemption fees for all funds
promotions.description: Ant Bank has launched a new investment fund platform offering funds from leading companies. During this limited-time promotion, customers can enjoy zero subscription fees and zero redemption fees for all funds, providing truly zero-cost investment opportunities.

promotions.title: One-stop Hong Kong and US Stock Trading Platform
promotions.highlight: 🌎 Access to Hong Kong and US stock markets in one platform
promotions.description: A comprehensive trading platform connecting Hong Kong and US stock markets, allowing customers to access global investment opportunities. The platform offers Hong Kong stocks, US stocks, ETFs and other global investment solutions.

promotions.title: Time Deposit with No Early Withdrawal Penalties
promotions.highlight: 🔓 No penalty for early withdrawal of time deposits
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers time deposits with no penalties for early withdrawal. Customers can withdraw their entire time deposit before maturity without incurring any penalty fees, providing flexibility with their savings.

promotions.title: Guaranteed Safe Deposit Service
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Lock your deposits for enhanced security against fraud
promotions.description: Ant Bank has launched the Guaranteed Safe Deposit Service, an anti-fraud measure initiated by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority. This service allows customers to lock idle deposits, preventing unauthorized transfers while still earning interest and maintaining deposit protection.

promotions.title: Time Deposit with Early Withdrawal Without Penalty
promotions.highlight: 🔓 Withdraw your time deposit early with zero penalty
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers time deposits with no penalty for early withdrawal, allowing customers to access their funds when needed without financial penalties. Full withdrawal of the deposit is required (partial withdrawals not supported).

promotions.title: Direct Transfer from Libra Savings to Third-Party Accounts
promotions.highlight: 🔄 Transfer directly from Libra Savings to third-party accounts
promotions.description: Customers can now transfer funds directly from their Libra Savings account to third-party accounts through the Ant Bank APP. The daily transfer limit has also been increased to up to HKD 1 million.

promotions.title: Dual-Account Security Service
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Lock your reserve deposits for enhanced security
promotions.description: Ant Bank has launched the Dual-Account Security Service, an anti-fraud measure promoted by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority. This service allows customers to lock their reserve deposits, preventing fund transfers through any channel to reduce the risk of fraudulent transactions.

promotions.title: Installment Loan with Fast Approval
promotions.highlight: 💸 Simple loan application with instant fund disbursement
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers installment loans with a simple application process and instant fund disbursement. The service features flexible loan amounts, special low interest rates, a simplified application process, and fast approval and disbursement.
promotions.cost: Loan interest and potential fees apply

promotions.title: Personal Loan with Revolving Credit
promotions.highlight: 🔄 Revolving credit with flexible withdrawal and instant disbursement
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers a revolving personal loan product where the credit limit can be reused, allowing flexible withdrawals and instant fund disbursement. Features include easy financial management, simple application, transparent fees, and flexible withdrawals.
promotions.cost: Loan interest and potential fees apply

promotions.title: SGAD (Smart Guarded Account Designation) Service
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Lock your standby deposits with SGAD for extra security
promotions.description: Ant Bank (Hong Kong) has launched the Smart Guarded Account Designation (SGAD) service, an anti-fraud measure introduced by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority. This service allows customers to lock standby deposits which cannot be transferred out through any channels, reducing the risk of fraudulent transfers.

promotions.title: Low Minimum Time Deposit Amount
promotions.highlight: 💰 Open a time deposit with just HKD 1
promotions.description: Ant Bank allows customers to place time deposits with a minimum amount of just HKD 1. This exceptionally low entry threshold makes time deposits accessible to all customers regardless of their financial capacity.

promotions.title: Multi-Currency Time Deposit
promotions.highlight: 🌐 Place time deposits in HKD and USD currencies
promotions.description: Ant Bank's time deposit service supports both Hong Kong Dollar and US Dollar deposits. This multi-currency support allows customers to diversify their time deposits across different currencies.

promotions.title: Securities Trading Commission-Free Promotion
promotions.highlight: 🏆 Trade stocks with zero commission fees!
promotions.description: Ant Bank offers zero commission on securities trading, allowing customers to trade Hong Kong and US stocks more cost-effectively. This promotion is part of their one-stop securities trading service with bank-level wealth management.
promotions.cost: Free, subject to terms and conditions

promotions.title: Fastee Secure Service
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Enhanced security for your deposits with anti-fraud measures!
promotions.description: Ant Bank has launched the Fastee Secure Service, an anti-fraud measure initiated by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority. The service allows customers to lock spare deposits that cannot be transferred out through any channels, reducing the risk of fraud while still earning interest.

promotions.title: Account Opening in 5 Minutes
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open an account in just 5 minutes
promotions.description: Open a Fusion Bank account in 5 minutes with just your HKID card and mobile number. The account opening process is designed to be completed before your coffee is ready.
promotions.quota: Hong Kong identity card holder aged 18 or above, non-US person only

promotions.title: Small Change Investment from HKD 1
promotions.highlight: 💰 Start saving from just HKD 1
promotions.description: Flexible savings plan allowing customers to start saving from as little as HKD 1. Designed to help customers save for their next adventure or personal milestone.

promotions.title: Multi-Currency Transfers in HKD, CNY and USD
promotions.highlight: 🌐 Transfer funds in HKD, CNY and USD locally
promotions.description: Transfer service that allows customers to make instant transfers in HKD, CNY or USD to other local accounts. Available Monday to Friday (working days) from 9:00am to 5:00pm.

promotions.title: Global Remittance Services
promotions.highlight: 🌍 Send money globally from your smartphone
promotions.description: Send money globally from your smartphone with real-time exchange rates. Allows customers to purchase foreign currency and send it abroad or to payment networks for cashless spending worldwide.

promotions.title: Deposit Protection up to HKD 800,000
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Deposits protected up to HKD 800,000
promotions.description: Fusion Bank is a member of Hong Kong's Deposit Protection Scheme with eligible deposits protected to a maximum of HKD 800,000 per depositor. This provides security and peace of mind for customers.

promotions.title: Flash Monday High-Interest HKD Time Deposit
promotions.highlight: ⚡ High-interest HKD time deposits on Mondays
promotions.description: Special high-interest rates for HKD time deposits available exclusively on Mondays. This 'Flash Monday' promotion allows customers to enjoy enhanced returns on their Hong Kong Dollar deposits.

promotions.title: Savings Interest Plus
promotions.highlight: 💸 Enhanced interest rates on savings accounts
promotions.description: Special promotion offering enhanced interest rates on savings accounts. Allows customers to earn higher returns on their deposits compared to standard savings rates.

promotions.title: Foreign Currency Exchange Promotion
promotions.highlight: 💱 Special rates for foreign currency exchange
promotions.description: Foreign currency exchange promotion with special rates for customers. Allows exchange between major currencies including USD, HKD, and CNY with no upper limit on exchange amounts.

promotions.title: Foreign Exchange Rewards Campaign
promotions.highlight: 🔄 Special rewards for foreign currency exchange
promotions.description: Special promotion for customers exchanging currencies with Fusion Bank. The campaign includes benefits for exchanging between HKD, USD, and CNY with no upper limit on transaction amounts.

promotions.title: Foreign Exchange Time Deposit Bonus Interest
promotions.highlight: 📈 Bonus interest on foreign currency time deposits
promotions.description: Enhanced interest rates for time deposits in foreign currencies. Available for customers who exchange and deposit foreign currencies including USD and RMB with Fusion Bank.

promotions.title: Fixed Deposit Bonus Interest for Foreign Currency Exchange
promotions.highlight: 💱 Special exchange rates and time deposit bonus interest

promotions.title: Foreign Currency Time Deposit Interest Rate Boost
promotions.highlight: 🔼 Enhanced interest rates for foreign currency time deposits
promotions.description: Special promotion offering boosted interest rates for time deposits in foreign currencies. Available for customers exchanging currencies and placing them in time deposits.

promotions.title: liviSave Preferential Savings Rate
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn with preferential savings rate, no minimum deposit required
promotions.description: Grow your money with liviSave's special preferential savings rate. No minimum deposit is required to enjoy this promotional rate, making it accessible for all customers.

promotions.title: Fast and Free FPS Transfers
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Fast and free transfers anytime with FPS
promotions.description: Send money instantly to anyone at any time using the Faster Payment System (FPS). This service is offered free of charge and available 24/7.

promotions.title: Secure QR Payment System
promotions.highlight: 🛒 Fast and secure QR payments across Hong Kong
promotions.description: Make secure and convenient payments using QR codes at merchants all across Hong Kong. Enjoy a seamless and quick payment experience with advanced security features.

promotions.title: 100% Online Account Opening
promotions.highlight: 📱 Open account 100% online, quick and easy
promotions.description: Experience a fully digital account opening process that can be completed entirely on your phone. No complicated documents needed, making it quick and easy to join livi anytime, anywhere.

promotions.title: livi Rewards Program
promotions.highlight: 🎁 Enjoy daily rewards and delights
promotions.description: livi Rewards program offers everyday delights and rewards to customers. The program is designed to bring value to your daily life with special offers and benefits.

promotions.title: QR Cash Withdrawal
promotions.highlight: 💵 Withdraw cash using QR codes
promotions.description: Use QR codes for cash withdrawals, offering a convenient alternative to traditional ATM cards. This feature provides a quick and secure way to access your money.

promotions.title: liviSave No Minimum Balance
promotions.highlight: 🏦 No minimum balance requirement and no fees for account
promotions.description: Open a liviSave account with no minimum balance requirement and no account maintenance fees. Designed to meet both spending and saving needs, this flexible account offers hassle-free banking.

promotions.title: liviSave No Fees Account
promotions.highlight: 🆓 No fees and no minimum deposit required
promotions.description: Open a liviSave account with no fees and no minimum deposit balance requirements. The account caters to both paying and saving needs with complete flexibility.

promotions.title: Universal Voyage Travel Insurance Plan
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Comprehensive travel insurance protection
promotions.description: livi offers the Universal Voyage Travel Insurance Plan to provide protection during your travels. This plan covers various travel-related risks and emergencies for customers.

promotions.title: Easy HomeCare Insurance
promotions.highlight: 🏠 Protection for your home with Easy HomeCare
promotions.description: livi provides Easy HomeCare insurance plan to protect customers' homes and belongings. This insurance product offers coverage for various home-related risks and damages.

promotions.title: Pet Care Insurance
promotions.highlight: 🐾 Insurance coverage for your beloved pets
promotions.description: livi offers Pet Care insurance plan to help cover veterinary expenses and other pet-related costs. This plan provides financial protection for pet owners when caring for their furry family members.

promotions.title: livi Flexi Personal Loan
promotions.highlight: 💸 Flexible personal loan solutions
promotions.description: livi Flexi Loan offers personal loan options with flexible terms to meet various financial needs. The loan product provides customers with access to funds for personal expenses with customizable repayment schedules.

promotions.title: livi Flexi Balance Transfer
promotions.highlight: 💱 Transfer outstanding balances with flexible terms
promotions.description: livi offers a Balance Transfer option under their Flexi Loan product to help customers consolidate existing debts. This service allows transferring balances from other financial institutions to livi with potentially more favorable terms.

promotions.title: livi Business SME Financing
promotions.highlight: 🏢 Financing solutions for small and medium enterprises
promotions.description: livi Business offers SME Financing options to help small and medium-sized businesses access capital for growth and operations. This financing solution is designed specifically for the needs of SME customers.
promotions.cost: Interest rates and fees not specified

promotions.title: BOC Chill Card
promotions.highlight: 💳 Special benefits with the BOC Chill Card
promotions.description: livi offers the BOC Chill Card for customers looking for payment solutions with added benefits. This card provides various privileges and features for cardholders' everyday spending needs.

promotions.title: BOC Mastercard Debit Card
promotions.highlight: 💳 Convenient spending with BOC Mastercard Debit Card
promotions.description: livi provides the BOC Mastercard Debit Card that allows direct access to funds in customers' accounts. This card offers worldwide acceptance and secure payment options for daily transactions.

promotions.title: Money Safe Rewards
promotions.highlight: 🔒 Special rewards for keeping your money safe
promotions.description: livi offers 'Money Safe Rewards' (智安存獎賞) program that provides benefits to customers for maintaining security measures. This program rewards customers for practicing safe banking habits.

promotions.title: No Minimum Deposit Requirement
promotions.highlight: 🆓 No fees and no minimum balance requirements
promotions.description: Open and maintain a liviSave account with no minimum deposit requirement and no maintenance fees. This feature makes the account accessible to everyone regardless of their financial situation.

promotions.title: Pay your tax with Mox Credit Card, split and earn cash reward

promotions.description: Pay your tax bill with Mox Credit Card and apply for Instalment to spread the payment while earning up to HKD500 in cash rewards. This offer coincides with the second tax instalment deadline to help ease financial pressure.

promotions.title: Keeta Exclusive Flash Sale Discount
promotions.highlight: ⚡️ Up to HKD80 off orders on Keeta
promotions.description: Exclusive flash sale for Mox cardholders when ordering on Keeta. Enjoy a Mox exclusive discount of up to HKD20 off per order, saving up to HKD80 for the whole month. Additional surprise vouchers and welcome rewards available to enhance home parties.

promotions.title: Xiaomi Shopping Cash Rebate and Installment Offer
promotions.highlight: 📱 Up to 7% total cash rewards at Xiaomi + 0% Instalments
promotions.description: Shop at mi.com or any Xiaomi Store with Mox Credit Card to unlock up to 5% extra cash rebate (capped at HKD450) plus up to 12-month 0% interest instalments. Combined with the standard up to 2% Unlimited CashBack for a total of up to 7% cash rewards.

promotions.title: Mox Journey from Scratch Promotion
promotions.highlight: 💥 Scratch & win up to reward worth HKD8,888
promotions.description: Complete any of five simple challenges to get a Mox Scratch Card with instant prize reveal. Finishing more challenges multiplies chances to win the top prize of HKD8,888 (HKD8,000 SOL(s) (Solana) + HKD888 cash reward).

promotions.title: Indulge and Grow Bonus Deposit Promotion
promotions.highlight: 💸 Chance to win a 1-month 'free lunch' when depositing your bonus

promotions.title: Mox x csl 'Best-in-Town' Exclusive Plan Offer

promotions.description: Exclusive plan offer for csl customers. Sign up for a new plan or renew existing one with Mox Credit Card autopay to automatically enjoy an HKD180 monthly fee rebate plus a free Now TV beIN SPORTS Super Pack 1-Month Pass valued at HKD188.

promotions.title: Travel Pick & Go Eggstra Care+ Free Add-on Coverage

promotions.title: MOXTRAVEL New Customer Welcome Offer
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Earn up to 28,500 miles through spending and saving
promotions.description: New customers who enter invitation code 'MOXTRAVEL' to open a Mox account and apply for a Mox Credit Card can earn up to 28,500 miles through spending and saving activities. This amount is sufficient for a round-trip flight to Asia.

promotions.title: Samsung S26 Series Exclusive Offer at The Club

promotions.description: Limited exclusive offer for the new Samsung S26 series at The Club. Spend HKD1,800 or more on The Club with Mox Credit Card and enter promo code CLUBMOX2026 to enjoy an instant HKD100 discount, on top of up to 2% Unlimited CashBack.

promotions.title: Uber Taxi Ride Spending Reward

promotions.title: MOXDEPO Time Deposit Invitation Code Promotion
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn HKD2,500 cash rewards with time deposit
promotions.description: New customers can open a Mox Account using invitation code 'MOXDEPO', complete account opening within 15 days, place a Time Deposit of at least HKD250,000 within 7 days, and maintain the balance until the end of the Hold Fund Period to earn HKD2,500 cash rewards.
promotions.quota: Only for customers who haven't held a Mox Account in the 12 months prior

promotions.title: MOXSMART Double Rewards Welcome Offer
promotions.highlight: 💵 20% cash rebate from spendings across 5 hot merchants
promotions.description: Double rewards promotion allowing customers to earn 20% cash rebate from spendings across 5 hot merchants, plus additional rewards from savings. Combined spending and saving rewards maximize customer benefits.

promotions.title: MOXBILL26 HKT Bill Payment Offer
promotions.highlight: 💳 HKD1,200 cash rewards + up to 2% Unlimited CashBack on HKT bills
promotions.description: Pay HKT bills and earn HKD1,200 cash rewards plus up to 2% Unlimited CashBack. This offer rewards customers for setting up bill payments with Mox, providing significant cash rewards on top of regular cashback.

promotions.title: Trip.com Year-Round Exclusive Discount
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Up to 8% off + Up to 2% Unlimited CashBack on Trip.com
promotions.description: Year-round exclusive offer for Trip.com bookings with Mox Credit Card. Enjoy up to 8% off on Trip.com bookings plus earn up to 2% Unlimited CashBack on all purchases, making travel bookings more rewarding all year long.
promotions.cost: Booking on Trip.com with Mox Credit Card

promotions.title: Personal Accident Cushion Premium Rebate
promotions.highlight: ⚡️ Up to 2 months premium rebate with Personal Accident Cushion
promotions.description: Double reward promotion offering up to 2 months of premium rebate when purchasing Personal Accident Cushion insurance. This offer provides significant savings on insurance premiums while maintaining coverage benefits.
promotions.cost: Purchase of Personal Accident Cushion insurance required

promotions.title: Payroll with Mox Top-up Promotion
promotions.highlight: 💼 1.5% p.a. bonus on savings & 2% CashBack with payroll setup
promotions.description: Set up payroll with Mox to receive a 1.5% p.a. top-up on savings rates plus Unlimited 2% CashBack on Mox Credit Card spending. This ongoing program rewards customers who receive their salary through Mox.

promotions.title: Mission Bonus Rate Savings Program
promotions.highlight: 🚀 Up to 3.5% p.a. on your deposit by stacking rates
promotions.description: Stack wins and stack rates to earn up to 3.5% p.a. interest on deposits. The Mission Bonus Rate program allows customers to achieve higher interest rates by completing various banking tasks or missions.

promotions.title: Mox Referral Programme
promotions.highlight: 🎉 HKD300 cash reward for both referrer and referee
promotions.description: Share your referral code to invite friends to join Mox. Both referrer and referee earn HKD300 cash reward when the referee opens a Mox account, applies for Mox Credit Card, and completes HKD1,000 eligible spending within the specified timeframe.
promotions.cost: Referee must spend HKD1,000 with Mox Credit Card

promotions.title: CLUBLINK Welcome Offer
promotions.highlight: 🎁 Rewards worth up to HKD1,400 with CLUBLINK code
promotions.description: Open a Mox Account with invitation code 'CLUBLINK' to enjoy fantastic rewards worth up to HKD1,400. This special welcome offer provides new customers with significant rewards for joining Mox and using the specific invitation code.

promotions.title: Mox Asia Miles Time Deposit
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Earn Asia Miles with time deposits
promotions.description: Mox Asia Miles Time Deposit allows customers to fly farther by earning Asia Miles through time deposits. This product combines the benefits of saving money with earning travel miles, providing value for customers interested in both.

promotions.title: FlexiBoost Savings Account
promotions.highlight: 💰 Unmatched flexibility with competitive interest rates
promotions.description: FlexiBoost savings account offers unmatched flexibility combined with competitive interest rates. This permanent product feature provides customers with the benefits of high interest while maintaining flexible access to their funds.

promotions.title: New FX Users Cash Reward
promotions.highlight: 💱 Up to HKD175 cash rewards for new FX users
promotions.description: New FX users can get up to HKD175 cash rewards when using Mox FX services for the first time. This promotion encourages customers to try Mox's foreign exchange services with the incentive of cash rewards.

promotions.title: Unlimited CashBack with Mox Credit Card
promotions.highlight: 💳 Best in town! Unlimited CashBack on all purchases
promotions.description: Enjoy Unlimited CashBack with Mox Credit Card on all purchases with no category restrictions or spending caps. This permanent product feature provides consistent cashback rewards on every transaction made with the Mox Credit Card.

promotions.title: Instant Earnings on Deposits
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Instant interest earnings without waiting periods
promotions.description: Say goodbye to waiting and hello to instant earnings on deposits. This permanent product feature allows customers to earn interest immediately on their deposits without traditional waiting periods typically associated with savings accounts.

promotions.title: 1500MOX New Customer Welcome Offer
promotions.highlight: 💸 Earn up to HKD1,500 cash reward plus access to 2% Unlimited CashBack
promotions.description: New customers who use invitation code '1500MOX' to open a Mox account and apply for a Mox Credit Card can earn up to HKD1,500 in cash rewards by meeting spending requirements at any merchant in Hong Kong. For a limited time, also unlock 2% Unlimited CashBack or HKD4=1 mile.

promotions.title: Instant Earnings on Deposits
promotions.highlight: 💰 HKD1,400 Cash Rewards for HKT shop purchases
promotions.description: Shop at HKT to receive HKD1,400 in Cash Rewards. This promotion rewards customers for making purchases at HKT retail locations or online store with significant cash incentives.

promotions.title: Mox Credit Card Miles Conversion
promotions.highlight: ✈️ HKD4=1 mile + 0 Limits + 0% FX Fees on all spending
promotions.description: Unlock your next journey with Mox Credit Card offering HKD4=1 mile conversion rate for all spending with no limits and 0% FX fees. This permanent feature makes the card ideal for travelers and those collecting miles.

promotions.title: Mox 0% Fund Subscription Fee Promotion
promotions.highlight: 🏦 0% fund subscription fee on any fund purchase
promotions.description: Mox Invest is offering 0% fund subscription fee on any fund purchase during the promotion period. Low entry threshold at just HKD100/USD100, making it easy to start investing. Other fees and charges still apply, including annual management fees and custodian fees.

promotions.title: HKT Shop Cash Rewards
promotions.highlight: 🛒 HKD1,400 Cash Rewards when shopping at HKT
promotions.description: Shop at HKT to get HKD1,400 Cash Rewards when using Mox for payment. This promotion rewards customers for making purchases at HKT shops with significant cash rewards.
promotions.cost: Shopping at HKT required (amount not specified)

promotions.title: 0% Interest Instant Clear
promotions.highlight: 💸 0% interest on Instant Clear loans
promotions.description: 0% interest offer for Instant Clear loans, allowing customers to borrow without paying interest charges. This special promotion makes short-term borrowing more affordable through the Instant Clear product.
promotions.period: No specific period mentioned, indicated by *

promotions.title: Mox Zone on The Club Year-Round Deals
promotions.highlight: 🛍️ Year-round exclusive deals on The Club
promotions.description: Mox Zone is now available on The Club, offering year-round exclusive deals for Mox customers. This ongoing partnership provides special discounts and offers exclusively for Mox cardholders when shopping on The Club platform.
promotions.cost: Shopping on The Club with Mox Card

promotions.title: Tax Season Instant Loan with Low APR
promotions.highlight: 💸 APR as low as 1.18% plus cash rewards up to HKD10,888
promotions.description: Tax Season Instant Loan with APR reduced to as low as 1.18%. Apply through the Mox app for personalized quotation and instant disbursement. Earn up to HKD10,888 cash reward for successful application of designated Instant Loans.

promotions.title: CLUBLINK New Customer Welcome Offer
promotions.highlight: 🎁 Enjoy rewards worth up to HKD1,400
promotions.description: Open a Mox Account with invitation code 'CLUBLINK' to enjoy fantastic rewards worth up to HKD1,400. Special promotion for new customers linking Mox with The Club membership benefits.
promotions.cost: Opening Mox account with specified code

promotions.title: Instant Interest on Time Deposits
promotions.highlight: 🔄 0% interest on Instant Clear facility
promotions.description: Access funds with 0% interest through Mox's Instant Clear facility. Quickly borrow what you need without paying interest, making it an affordable way to manage short-term cash flow needs.

promotions.title: Mox Credit Card Miles Rewards Scheme
promotions.highlight: ✈️ For all spending HKD4=1 mile + 0 Limits + 0% FX Fees
promotions.description: Earn 1 mile for every HKD4 spent with your Mox Credit Card with no earning limits. Additionally, enjoy 0% foreign exchange fees on international purchases, making this ideal for travelers.

promotions.title: MOXHKT25 HKT Shopping Rewards
promotions.highlight: 💰 Shop at HKT to get HKD1,400 Cash Rewards
promotions.description: Shop at HKT with your Mox Card to earn HKD1,400 in Cash Rewards. This limited-time promotion offers substantial rewards for shopping at HKT stores.

promotions.title: MOXDEPO Time Deposit Welcome Offer
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn HKD2,500 cash rewards with Time Deposit
promotions.description: Open a Mox Account using invitation code 'MOXDEPO', complete account opening within 15 days, place a Time Deposit of at least HKD250,000 within 7 days, and maintain the balance until the end of the Hold Fund Period to earn HKD2,500 cash rewards.
promotions.quota: New customers who haven't held any Mox Account in 12 months

promotions.title: Year-round offers with Mox Credit Card
promotions.highlight: 🎁 Exclusive offers with Unlimited CashBack or Miles
promotions.description: Enjoy fabulous year-round offers when using your Mox Credit Card at partner merchants. Earn Unlimited CashBack or Unlimited Miles on all your spending throughout the year.
promotions.quota: Available to all Mox Credit Card holders

promotions.title: Daily Interest Calculation
promotions.highlight: 💸 Interest on savings calculated and credited to your account daily
promotions.description: Mox calculates and credits interest to your Mox Account daily, allowing your savings to grow faster. This is a permanent feature of Mox accounts with no end date or special eligibility requirements.

promotions.title: Mox Invest Trading Services
promotions.highlight: 📈 Trade HK and US stocks including fractional shares with low fees
promotions.description: Mox is the first digital bank allowing customers to trade in both HK and US stocks, including fractional shares. Invest with low fees in stocks and funds with the security and advantages of a bank.

promotions.title: USD Savings Rate
promotions.highlight: 💵 1% p.a. interest on USD savings with no strings attached
promotions.description: Starting 1 March 2025, enjoy 1% p.a. interest on your USD savings with no strings attached. Interest is calculated and credited to your account daily, allowing you to watch your savings grow every day.

promotions.title: Mox Credit FPS Payments
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Pay with Mox Credit via FPS for transfers and bill payments
promotions.description: Use your Mox Credit to make payments via FPS, making daily transfers or paying bills effortlessly. This feature is automatically unlocked when your credit limit is approved, with no extra documents required.

promotions.title: 3-Minute Investment Account Opening for Existing Customers
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open your account in as fast as 3 minutes
promotions.description: PAObank offers a streamlined account opening process that can be completed in as little as 3 minutes. This quick onboarding is available for standard cases where no additional information or documents are required.

promotions.title: No Minimum Balance Requirement
promotions.highlight: 💰 Maintain your account with no minimum balance required
promotions.description: PAObank accounts have no minimum balance requirements, allowing customers to maintain their accounts without worrying about minimum deposit thresholds or associated fees.

promotions.title: 24/7 Full Banking Capability
promotions.highlight: 🕒 Access full banking capabilities anytime through the app
promotions.description: PAObank provides round-the-clock banking services through their mobile application. Customers can manage deposits, transfers, cross-border payments, and foreign exchange transactions at any time without restrictions.

promotions.title: Services for Residents and Visitors in Hong Kong
promotions.highlight: 🌏 Banking services available for visitors physically in Hong Kong
promotions.description: PAObank offers banking services to visiting customers who are physically present in Hong Kong. This enables non-residents to access banking services during their stay in Hong Kong.
promotions.quota: Visitors physically present in Hong Kong

promotions.title: Low Investment Threshold for Money Market Funds
promotions.highlight: 💲 Start investing with as little as 20 USD or HKD 100
promotions.description: PAObank allows customers to invest in money market funds with a low entry threshold. Investments can start from as little as 20 USD for USD-denominated funds or HKD 100 for HKD-denominated funds.
promotions.cost: Free subscription, minimum investment amount applies

promotions.title: Hong Kong Stocks Trading with 0 Platform Fee
promotions.highlight: 🏛️ Trade Hong Kong stocks with no platform fees
promotions.description: PAObank offers Hong Kong stock trading with no platform fees. Customers only pay the commission fee of 0.15% with a minimum charge of HKD 50 per transaction.

promotions.title: US Stocks Extended Trading Hours
promotions.highlight: 📈 Extended 16-hour US stock trading with advanced analytics
promotions.description: PAObank offers an extended 16-hour trading window for US stocks, covering pre-market, regular, and after-hours sessions. The service includes advanced analytics tools to help investors make informed decisions.

promotions.title: Hong Kong Stock Real-time Level 1 Market Data
promotions.highlight: 📊 Unlimited real-time Level 1 stock quotes at no charge
promotions.description: PAObank provides free Level 1 real-time stock quotes with unlimited usage. This service allows investors to access current market data without incurring additional costs.

promotions.title: Money Market Funds Same-Day Redemption
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Redeem money market funds with same-day credit to your account
promotions.description: Ping An Digital Bank offers money market funds with the possibility of same-day redemption to your bank account. This provides customers with quick access to their funds when needed.
promotions.quota: Available to all investment account holders

promotions.title: Mixed and Equity Funds 1% Subscription Fee
promotions.highlight: 🏦 Low subscription fees for various fund types
promotions.description: Customers can enjoy discounted subscription fees for various fund types: 0.5% for bond funds and 1% for mixed and equity funds. This makes fund investments more accessible with lower entry costs.
promotions.cost: 0.5% for bond funds, 1% for mixed and equity funds

promotions.title: US Stock Trading Fixed Commission
promotions.highlight: 🇺🇸 Trade US stocks for just USD 0.012 per share
promotions.description: PAObank offers US stock trading with a competitive commission of USD 0.012 per share with a minimum charge of USD 7.88 per trade. There are no additional platform fees, providing transparent pricing for US stock investors.
promotions.quota: Available to all investment account holders
promotions.cost: USD 0.012 per share (minimum USD 7.88 per trade)

promotions.title: System Upgrade Notice
promotions.highlight: ⚠️ Scheduled maintenance affecting mobile banking and customer services
promotions.description: The bank will perform system upgrades and maintenance from 01:30am to 06:30am on August 9, 2020. During this period, mobile banking and customer services may be impacted.

promotions.title: WeLab Global Wallet - Best FX Rate in Town
promotions.highlight: 💱 Best FX rates compared to other retail banks in Hong Kong
promotions.description: WeLab Bank offers the best exchange rates in town for 10 major currencies including USD, JPY, EUR, GBP, etc. The comparison is based on rates collected from 28 retail banks in Hong Kong, with rates that don't include special promotions but include any fees charged.

promotions.title: WeLab Global Wallet Debit Card - $0 Foreign Currency Transaction Fee
promotions.highlight: 💳 $0 foreign currency transaction fees for 10 supported currencies
promotions.description: WeLab Global Wallet Debit Card offers $0 foreign currency transaction fees when settling in 10 supported currencies including JPY, USD, CNY, AUD, GBP, EUR, SGD, CAD, CHF and NZD. This makes foreign transactions more affordable without the usual exchange fees.

promotions.title: Easter Lucky Draw & Cash Rebate Promotion
promotions.highlight: 🎰 Win travel cash vouchers worth HKD1,000 and other prizes
promotions.description: Use WeLab Global Wallet Debit Card for overseas spending and currency exchange to earn lucky draw chances. 300 prizes available including HKD1,000 travel cash vouchers. The more you spend and exchange, the higher your chances of winning.

promotions.title: WeLab Bank Overseas Spending Cashback Campaign
promotions.highlight: 💰 Up to 3% cash rebate on overseas spending
promotions.description: Eligible cardholders can enjoy up to 0.2% cash rebate on local spending and up to 3% cash rebate on overseas spending with WeLab Global Wallet Debit Card. Maximum rebate is HKD 50 or equivalent per eligible transaction.

promotions.title: WeLab Featured Funds - $0 Subscription and Switching Fees
promotions.highlight: 📈 $0 subscription and switching fees with no upper limit
promotions.description: WeLab Bank offers unlimited $0 subscription and switching fees for its investment funds, partnering with top global fund companies. This helps customers flexibly allocate funds and build diversified passive income streams without paying traditional transaction fees.

promotions.title: Digital Wealth Advisory Service
promotions.highlight: 🧠 AI-powered investment portfolio recommendations
promotions.description: WeLab Bank's Digital Wealth Advisory service created in partnership with Allianz Global Investors provides personalized investment portfolio recommendations based on customers' investment goals and personal situations. Smart notifications help track investment progress.

promotions.title: Trip.com Discount with WeLab Global Wallet Debit Card
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Up to HKD 500 discount on Trip.com bookings
promotions.description: During the promotion period, Trip.com members who pay with WeLab Global Wallet Debit Card when booking designated products that meet specified amounts can enjoy discounts up to HKD 500 by entering the designated promo code at checkout.

promotions.title: WeLab Bank Personal Loan R Friends Referral Program
promotions.highlight: 🤝 Earn HKD 800 cash reward per successful personal loan referral
promotions.description: WeLab Bank customers can earn HKD 800 cash reward for each friend who successfully applies for a WeLab Bank personal loan using their referral code (starting with "FP" or "TR") and draws down the loan within 7 days of approval.
promotions.quota: Maximum 10 successful referrals (HKD 8,000) per eligible customer

promotions.title: Tesla Customer Personal Installment Loan Offer
promotions.highlight: 🚘 Low interest rate from 4.55% APR for Tesla customers
promotions.description: Tesla customers can enjoy a special personal loan with APR as low as 4.55% by using promo code "TESLA5" when opening a WeLab Bank account or applying for a loan, and providing proof of Tesla vehicle subscription.

promotions.title: WeLab Fund Platform - Flat 0.1% Monthly Fee
promotions.highlight: 💰 Save up to 85% on transaction fees with flat 0.1% monthly platform fee
promotions.description: WeLab Bank charges a flat 0.1% monthly fee based on total fund value instead of traditional subscription fees. This helps customers save up to 85% on transaction costs compared to traditional charging models, allowing worry-free fund investing and portfolio adjustments.

promotions.title: 50 Extra Lucky Draw Chances for New Customers
promotions.highlight: 🎲 New customers get 50 extra lucky draw entries
promotions.description: New customers can receive 50 additional lucky draw chances for the Easter Lucky Draw promotion. Combined with overseas spending rebates, new customers can maximize their rewards when using the Global Wallet Debit Card.

promotions.title: Personal Loan Cash Rebate up to HKD 23,888
promotions.highlight: 💸 Up to HKD 23,888 cash rebate on personal loans
promotions.description: WeLab Bank customers who successfully apply for a personal loan with an approved amount of HKD 150,001 or above, repayment period of 24 months or above, and draw down the loan within 7 days of approval can enjoy a cash rebate of up to HKD 23,888.
promotions.quota: Requires minimum loan amount of HKD 150,001 and minimum 24-month repayment period

promotions.title: Investment Fund Cash Rewards for New Customers
promotions.highlight: 📈 Up to HKD 4,000 cash reward for fund investments
promotions.description: New customers can enjoy up to HKD 4,000 cash rewards on cumulative eligible fund transactions as part of the 2-in-1 Welcome Rewards promotion when using promo code "WL5000" during account opening.

promotions.title: GoSave 2.0 4% p.a. Time Deposit for New Customers
promotions.highlight: 💰 Enjoy up to 4% p.a. interest rate on HKD time deposits
promotions.description: New customers can enjoy 4% p.a. interest rate when placing designated HKD GoSave 2.0 time deposits within the specified period as part of the 2-in-1 Welcome Rewards promotion.

promotions.title: WeLab Bank Welcome Offer - 2-in-1 Rewards
promotions.highlight: 💰 Enjoy cash rewards worth approximately HKD 5,000
promotions.description: New customers who open an account using promo code "WL5000" can enjoy 4% p.a. time deposit interest rate plus HKD 4,000 investment fund cash rewards, totaling approximately HKD 5,000 in rewards.

promotions.title: First-time Foreign Currency Exchange Rebate
promotions.highlight: 💱 HKD 50 cash rebate for first-time currency exchange
promotions.description: New foreign currency exchange customers who successfully exchange HKD 20,000 or more in a single transaction to one of 10 designated popular currencies can enjoy a HKD 50 cash rebate. Limited quotas available on a first-come, first-served basis.

promotions.title: WeLab Bank Referral Reward for Tesla Loan
promotions.highlight: 💰 HKD 800 cash reward for each successful Tesla loan referral
promotions.description: Refer friends who are Tesla owners to apply for a personal instalment loan with APR from 4.55% and earn HKD 800 cash reward for each successful referral. Friends must successfully draw down the loan within 7 days of approval.

promotions.title: WeLab Bank New Customer 2-in-1 Welcome Offer
promotions.highlight: 💰 Enjoy up to HKD 5,000 cash rewards with time deposit and investment
promotions.description: New customers who open an account with promo code 'WL5000' can enjoy dual welcome benefits: up to 4% p.a. time deposit interest rate and up to HKD 4,000 investment fund cash reward, totaling approximately HKD 5,000 in rewards.

promotions.title: First-time Foreign Currency Exchange Cash Rebate

promotions.description: First-time foreign currency exchange customers who successfully exchange HKD 20,000 or more into one of 10 designated popular foreign currencies in a single transaction can enjoy a HKD 50 cash rebate.
promotions.quota: Limited quota, first come first served; one-time per eligible customer

promotions.title: WeLab Bank Referral Rewards for Personal Loan
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn HKD 800 for each successful Tesla loan referral
promotions.description: Customers can refer friends who are Tesla owners to apply for WeLab Bank personal instalment loan with promo code 'TESLA5' to enjoy the special 4.55% APR offer. For each successful referral, the referrer will receive HKD 800 cash reward.

promotions.title: GoSave 2.0 Time Deposit 4% p.a. Interest Rate
promotions.highlight: 💰 Enjoy high 4% p.a. interest rate on HKD time deposits
promotions.description: New customers who open a WeLab Bank account with promo code 'WL5000' can enjoy a preferential interest rate of 4% p.a. on HKD GoSave 2.0 time deposits. The offer is available for one-month deposits placed during the specified period.

promotions.title: WeLab Money Plus Investment Service
promotions.highlight: 📊 Low-risk money market fund with same-day settlement
promotions.description: WeLab Money Plus offers money market funds with same-day settlement when instructions are submitted before 9am HKT. Aims for returns similar to time deposits but without lock-in periods.

promotions.title: ZA Bank 0% Fund Subscription Fee Offer until 31 Jul 2026
promotions.highlight: 💰 0% subscription fees on ALL funds with no cap
promotions.description: ZA Bank retail banking users who have activated fund trading services can enjoy 0% fund subscription fee offer and redemption fee waivers for all funds until July 31, 2026. This allows 100% of your money to go into the market.

promotions.title: Customer Referral Program - Referrer Rewards
promotions.highlight: 🤝 Earn up to HKD 90,000 by referring friends to open accounts

promotions.title: New Customer Welcome Reward and StockBack Bonus

promotions.description: New ZA Bank users who select the StockBack x ZA Card rewards program can enjoy an additional 1% stock rebate on their first HKD 10,000 of eligible transactions within 30 days of account opening. This stacks with the current 1.5% promotion for a total 2.5% rebate.

promotions.title: 20% p.a. HKD Time Deposit for New Customers (Deposit Condition)

promotions.quota: New customers referred through the referral program

promotions.title: ZA Card StockBack New Customer 2.5% Offer
promotions.highlight: 💰 Earn stocks with every eligible transaction (1% stock rebate)
promotions.description: Spending with your ZA Card allows you to earn stocks instead of just points. For each eligible transaction of at least HKD 10, choose 1 of 6 displayed stocks to receive as your rebate. The reward amount is 1% of the transaction amount.

promotions.title: Year-Round Travel Offers with ZA Card
promotions.highlight: ✈️ Special discounts on travel purchases all year round
promotions.description: ZA Bank offers year-round travel discounts when using ZA Card for travel-related purchases. This permanent feature allows cardholders to save on various travel expenses throughout the year.

promotions.title: Multi-Currency Savings Account
promotions.highlight: 🌎 Hold 11 currencies in one account
promotions.description: Hold 11 different currencies including HKD, CNY, USD, GBP, SGD, EUR, CAD, AUD, JPY, NZD, and CHF in one account. Exchange currencies 24/7 at your preferred rates with zero fees for flexible asset allocation.

promotions.title: Free Cash Withdrawals at Visa ATMs
promotions.highlight: 💵 Free cash withdrawals at 3,000+ Visa ATMs in Hong Kong
promotions.description: ZA Card holders can withdraw cash for free at over 3,000 Visa ATMs across Hong Kong. This provides convenient access to cash without additional fees.

promotions.title: Free Crypto Trading Platform Fee for New Customers
promotions.highlight: 🪙 $0 platform fee for the first 90 days after account opening
promotions.description: New customers who open a ZA Bank account can enjoy $0 platform fee when trading cryptocurrencies for the first 90 days after account opening. This allows new users to trade 24/7 directly with HKD or USD deposits without platform fees.

promotions.title: Custom Card Number Selection for ZA Card
promotions.highlight: 🔢 Choose the last 6 digits of your card number
promotions.description: ZA Bank is the first in Hong Kong to allow customers to choose the last 6 digits on their card face. This personalization feature gives cardholders more control over their banking experience.

promotions.title: ZA Card No Annual Fee
promotions.highlight: 💳 Zero annual fees and hidden charges on ZA Card
promotions.description: ZA Card comes with no annual fees or hidden charges. The Visa debit card truly belongs to the customer with no recurring costs, and supports digital payment methods including Apple Pay and Google Pay.

promotions.title: ZA Bank FPS Free Instant Transfers
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Free instant transfers between banks via FPS
promotions.description: ZA Bank offers free instant transfers via FPS (Faster Payment System). Users can receive HKD and CNY with just their mobile phone number and enjoy features like frequent payee listings and group Lai See sending.

promotions.title: ZA Bank 24/7 Banking Service
promotions.highlight: 🕒 Banking services available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week
promotions.description: ZA Bank provides round-the-clock banking services, allowing users to access their accounts and perform banking operations at any time without time constraints. Services include deposits, transfers, and foreign exchange.

promotions.title: ZA Bank 0% Brokerage & 0% Custody Fees for Stock Trading
promotions.highlight: 📈 0 brokerage and 0 custody fees for Hong Kong stocks
promotions.description: Trade Hong Kong stocks with zero commission and zero custody fees. Platform fee is as low as HKD 18 per transaction, allowing users to save up to HKD 1,000 in monthly trading costs compared to traditional brokers.

promotions.title: ZA Card PowerDraw Rebate Promotion
promotions.highlight: 🎰 Win up to 200% rebate through PowerDraw
promotions.description: Use your ZA Card to pay and participate in PowerDraw for a chance to win up to a 200% rebate on your purchases. Each eligible transaction gives you an opportunity to win through the PowerDraw feature.

promotions.title: ZA Bank x Wise Express Remittance
promotions.highlight: 🚀 Fast international transfers via Wise integration
promotions.description: ZA Bank offers express remittance service powered by Wise for HKD payments. This allows for faster international transfers compared to traditional methods.

promotions.title: Loan Approval in as fast as 90 seconds
promotions.highlight: ⚡ Loan approval results in as fast as 90 seconds
promotions.description: ZA Bank offers a simple loan application process with approval results in as fast as 90 seconds. Loans of up to HKD 1,000,000 are available with annualised percentage rates as low as 1.30%.

promotions.title: Insurance Application in as Fast as 3 Minutes
promotions.highlight: 🛡️ Apply for insurance in as fast as 3 minutes via smartphone
promotions.description: In partnership with ZA Insure, ZA Bank offers a quick insurance application process that can be completed in as fast as 3 minutes via smartphone. Coverage options include life insurance, critical illness insurance, and Voluntary Health Insurance Scheme (VHIS).

promotions.title: HK Stock Cash Rebate up to HKD 1,000
promotions.highlight: 💵 Earn up to HKD 1,000 cash rebate on stock purchases
promotions.description: Selected ZA Bank customers can receive up to HKD 1,000 cash rebate when they purchase stocks. Users can claim stock cash rebate vouchers via ZA Quest and apply them to their stock purchases to receive the cash rebate benefits.

promotions.title: ZA Bank Zero Fee SWIFT Global Transfers
promotions.highlight: 🌐 No ZA Bank fee for SWIFT transfers to 140+ countries
promotions.description: Transfer directly to over 140 countries and regions via SWIFT with zero ZA Bank fees. This makes international money transfers more affordable, though correspondent bank fees may still apply.
promotions.quota: All eligible ZA Bank account holders
promotions.cost: No ZA Bank fee, correspondent bank fees may apply

promotions.title: ZA Bank Customer Referral Program for Account Opening
promotions.highlight: 🏆 Win up to HKD 10,000 per phase for top referrers
promotions.description: During the 9-phase promotion period, the top 20 referrers with the highest number of successful account openings in each phase can receive rewards of up to HKD 10,000 per phase, with a maximum potential reward of HKD 90,000 across all phases.
promotions.quota: Top 20 referrers in each of 9 phases

promotions.title: ZA Bank 20% p.a. HKD Time Deposit Offer for New Fund Deposit
promotions.highlight: 💸 Enjoy 20% p.a. on 7-day HKD time deposit
promotions.description: New customers who deposit at least HKD 1,000 or equivalent within 14 days of account opening can receive a +19.9% p.a. 7-day HKD time deposit interest rate booster, bringing the total to 20% p.a. for up to HKD 20,000 new funds.
promotions.quota: New ZA Bank customers who meet deposit condition
promotions.cost: Minimum deposit of HKD 1,000 or equivalent

promotions.title: New User HKD 500 Cash Reward
promotions.highlight: 💵 Get up to HKD 500 cash reward when opening a new account
promotions.description: Selected customers can receive up to HKD 500 in cash rewards when opening a new ZA Bank account. Customers can complete specific tasks in ZA Quest after successful account opening to receive the reward.
promotions.quota: Selected new customers only; not applicable to customers who opened accounts through referral programs or have received other new customer gifts

promotions.title: 24/7 Customer Service
promotions.highlight: ⏰ Banking services available round-the-clock
promotions.description: ZA Bank provides 24/7 banking services with no time restrictions. All banking services are available at any time, providing maximum convenience for users regardless of when they need to conduct banking activities.

promotions.title: Open Account in as Fast as 2 Minutes
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open a bank account in as fast as 2 minutes
promotions.description: ZA Bank offers a streamlined digital account opening process that can be completed in as little as 2 minutes. This feature allows Hong Kong residents and visitors in Hong Kong to open an account online with zero deposit requirement.
promotions.quota: Available to all eligible Hong Kong residents and visitors in Hong Kong

promotions.title: 0 Brokerage and 0 Custody Fee Stock Trading
promotions.highlight: 📈 0 commission, 0 custody fees on stock trades
promotions.description: Trade stocks with zero brokerage fees and zero custody fees. Platform fees are as low as USD 1.99 for US stocks or HKD 18 per transaction for Hong Kong stocks, making investing more affordable.
promotions.quota: All ZA Bank users with activated stock trading services
promotions.cost: Platform fee from USD 1.99/HKD 18 per transaction

promotions.title: New Crypto Customer Fee Waiver
promotions.highlight: 🪙 $0 platform fee for first 90 days after account opening
promotions.description: New customers can enjoy $0 platform fee for crypto trading during the first 90 days after opening an account. Trade 24/7 directly with HKD or USD deposits with no platform fees during this period.

promotions.title: ZA Card with No Annual or Hidden Fees
promotions.highlight: 💳 Zero annual fees and no hidden charges
promotions.description: ZA Card is a Visa debit card with no annual fees or hidden charges. It also supports Apple Pay and Google Pay for convenient mobile payments.

promotions.title: HK Stock Trading New Account Bonus
promotions.highlight: 🏦 Receive up to HKD 1,500 for opening HK stock account
promotions.description: Open a ZA Bank account and activate Hong Kong stock trading to enjoy up to HKD 500 cash reward plus up to HKD 1,000 cash rebate when buying stocks. This promotion offers significant incentives for new stock trading customers.

promotions.title: New Account HKD 2,026 Welcome Reward
promotions.highlight: 🎁 Get rewards worth HKD 2,026 plus 2.5% stock rebate
promotions.description: New users who open an account using a referral code can receive rewards worth HKD 2,026 including fund position rebate vouchers and stock cash rebate vouchers. Additionally, they can enjoy 2.5% stock rebate on eligible purchases.

promotions.title: ZA Bank Welcome Offer with Code ZAUT66
promotions.highlight: 🎁 Receive HKD 2,026 in rewards and 20% p.a. HKD time deposit
promotions.description: New customers using the invitation code ZAUT66 can enjoy rewards worth HKD 2,026 and 20% p.a. interest rate on HKD time deposits. The offer includes various vouchers and interest rate boost coupons.

promotions.title: ZA Bank Account Opening in as fast as 2 minutes
promotions.highlight: ⏱️ Open an account in as fast as 2 minutes
promotions.description: ZA Bank offers a streamlined account opening process that allows customers to open an account in as little as 2 minutes. The service is available to both Hong Kong residents and visitors in Hong Kong with zero deposit requirements.

promotions.title: Fund Redemption Fee Waiver
promotions.highlight: 🆓 Redemption fee waivers for all funds
promotions.description: ZA Bank customers who have activated fund trading services can enjoy redemption fee waivers for all funds until July 31, 2026. This allows investors to redeem their fund investments without paying any redemption fees.
promotions.quota: All retail banking users who have activated fund trading services

promotions.title: ZA Bank Payment Connect Cross-Border Transfer
promotions.highlight: 🌏 Fee-free real-time transfers between Mainland China and Hong Kong
promotions.description: Send money between Mainland China and Hong Kong in real-time with zero fees using Payment Connect. Instant cross-border transfers without any handling charges.

promotions.title: New Stock Trading Customer Cash Rewards
promotions.highlight: 💵 Up to HKD 1,500 in cash rewards for new stock traders
promotions.description: New users can receive up to HKD 500 in cash rewards for opening an account, plus up to HKD 1,000 in cash rebates for buying stocks. This offer is specifically for Hong Kong stock trading customers.
promotions.cost: Must buy stocks to qualify for portion of rewards

promotions.title: Second 20% p.a. Time Deposit for Multi-Product Usage
promotions.highlight: 🔄 Additional 20% p.a. time deposit for using multiple products
promotions.description: New referred customers who hold deposits, funds, and stocks with a total balance of at least HKD 1,000 within 14 days of opening an account can receive an additional +19.9% p.a. 7-day HKD time deposit interest rate booster coupon, providing a second opportunity to enjoy 20% p.a. interest.
promotions.quota: New referred customers using multiple products

promotions.title: Fund Position Rebate Vouchers for New Customers
promotions.highlight: 🧾 Receive HKD 800 in fund position rebate vouchers
promotions.description: New customers can receive fund position rebate vouchers worth HKD 800 (including one HKD 780 voucher and one HKD 20 voucher). These vouchers are valid for 30 days after receipt and can be used to offset fund investment costs.
promotions.quota: New customers who open accounts with referral codes

promotions.title: Currency Exchange Discount Voucher
promotions.highlight: 💱 Receive HKD 126 currency exchange discount voucher
promotions.description: New customers can receive a HKD 126 currency exchange discount voucher valid for 30 days after receipt. This voucher can be used to reduce the cost of currency exchange transactions within ZA Bank.
promotions.quota: New customers who open accounts with referral codes

promotions.title: Group Lai See Feature
promotions.highlight: 🧧 Send Group Lai See with one tap without entering recipients individually
promotions.description: Users can distribute Lai See (red packets) to groups with a single tap, eliminating the need to enter recipients individually. This convenient feature simplifies the traditional practice of sending red packets during holidays and special occasions.
